top_findings.summary: The skill description includes commands that access live Kubernetes/OpenShift clusters using `oc get pods` and `oc get agents` commands for "semantic validation" and "claim verification" against production environments. For a documentation generation/validation tool, this constitutes excessive permission escalation as it requests production cluster access (which could include sensitive deployment data, pod statuses, and agent configurations) when the stated purpose only requires analyzing local source code files and documentation structure. This creates privilege escalation risks beyond the skill's documented scope.
